overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in wizard robes ascending through a gothic castle interior. The journey progresses through narrow spiral staircases, torch-lit corridors with tapestries, grand staircases under vaulted ceilings, and culminates in entering a large ceremonial hall with ornate wooden doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow spiral staircase with exposed brick walls

agents.ego_description: character walking up a tight spiral staircase with weathered red brick walls and stone steps

entered.detail: weathered brick wall with peeling plaster
worn stone steps with dark edges
lit wall-mounted torch providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow spiral staircase enclosed by red brick walls. The space is dimly lit by wall sconces, with stone steps winding upward in a tight curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with stone columns and decorative tapestry

events.description: exits narrow spiral staircase into wider corridor with stone columns

agents.ego_description: walking through a corridor passing wooden furniture and approaching a large wall tapestry

entered.detail: thick stone pillar supporting the ceiling
dark wooden cabinet with papers on top
large decorative tapestry depicting a figure in red

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the spiral stairs into a corridor with stone columns and marble floors. A large tapestry hangs on the far wall as the character moves toward the next staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with long ascending staircase and arched windows

agents.ego_description: climbing a long straight staircase beneath high gothic arches while passing another student

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs

entered.detail: intricate stone vaulted ceiling with ribbed arches
tall gothic window with diamond panes letting in natural light
ornate stone balustrade along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand staircase beneath a high gothic vaulted ceiling. Arched windows on the left provide natural light while wall sconces add warm illumination. Another student descends the stairs, passing by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with large bronze statue and massive wooden doors

events.description: reaches landing with large bronze statue and turns toward great hall entrance

agents.ego_description: passing a large bronze statue of a wizard on a creature and approaching massive wooden doors

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a robed wizard standing on a mythical creature
decorative stone railing with carved details
massive double doors made of dark wood with iron hinges

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a landing featuring an imposing bronze statue of a wizard mounted on a creature. Turning right, the character approaches a set of massive wooden doors at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with house banners and armor displays

events.description: large wooden doors open to reveal the interior great hall

agents.ego_description: walking through opened doors into a vast hall with red carpets and house banners

entered.detail: long red carpet with intricate patterns covering the floor
vertical banner with yellow and black stripes hanging from wall
suit of armor on pedestal holding a spear

segments.scene_description: The massive doors open to reveal a grand hall with a long red carpet. The character enters, passing suits of armor on pedestals and house banners hanging on the stone walls, approaching the far end of the chamber.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent through a gothic castle, transitioning from a cramped, dimly lit stairwell into a vast and opulent ceremonial hall. It begins with the character winding upward through a narrow spiral staircase enclosed by red brick walls and flickering wall sconces. As the character emerges from the stairs, the space opens into a corridor of marble floors and stone columns, leading toward a grand staircase beneath a high vaulted ceiling where natural light streams through arched windows. The scene then shifts to a landing dominated by an imposing bronze statue of a wizard before the camera turns toward a set of massive wooden doors. Finally, these doors swing open to reveal a grand hall featuring a long red carpet, suits of armor, and hanging house banners that stretch toward the far end of the chamber.
